headline: Jim Cramer on Capital One: “Stick With It”
summary: Capital One Financial Corporation (NYSE:COF) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer looked at. When a caller asked about the stock during the episode, Cramer stated: Okay, so here’s the problem with Capital One: it was flying, then the president decided, listen, we ought to cap interest rates.
